blended.narrative: Chestnut Mountain is expecting dry conditions over the next 48 hours with little to no accumulation. The 14-day outlook shows 6 inches total. Mild temps with highs near 43°F.

daily_summary.narrative: Sunday: light rain showers, highs of 50°F.
Monday: 5" of snow, highs of 37°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
